title: STATIONERY ISLAND A5 Lined Notebook, 360 Pages Thick Journal Notebook, Ruled Journal Berry Hardcover with 100gsm for Writing, Working, Studying, Diary
features: Premium Paper and Stylish Cover: This notebook features 100gsm paper that provides a smooth and pleasant writing experience. The hardcover design adds durability and an elegant look to the journal.

High Capacity and Thickness: With 360 total pages, this notebook offers ample space to fulfill your long-term writing needs. Sufficient page thickness allows you to record more content whether you're taking notes, journaling, or logging work details.

Assured Quality: The notebook's sewn binding construction ensures the pages lay flat for comfortable and organized writing. The high-quality ruled lines inside help you maintain neat and tidy handwriting. This notebook has undergone strict quality inspections to decrease issues like page detachment or ink bleeding.

Versatile Functionality: This notebook is ideal for daily use across a variety of applications - from studying and working to personal journaling. Its refined appearance also makes it a great decorative piece for offices or homes. Both students and professionals can enjoy a great user experience.

Multiple Colour: This notebook offers a variety of color options to meet the personal tastes and needs of different users. The black and dark blue notebooks exude a low-key and elegant temperament, which is very suitable for formal occasions. For those who pursue vitality and brightness, fresh and bright colors such as pink and yellow can show a unique personal style.
description: Product Description Why Choose STATIONERY ISLAND Journal? Learn new things and keep it all in this A5 notebook. Whether you use it for studying, note taking, travel, tracking your habits, planning projects and activities, drawing or sketching, this A5 notebook is perfectly suited to realise and record all of your thoughts, ideas and expressions. Special features Classic design for all-round use Ideal for journaling, travel journal, artist drawing, scapbooking or professional technical drawings and etc. Premium 100gsm Paper 100gsm acid-free paper suit for fountain pen, pencil, marker, while protecting your eyes in a light ivory color. Available in a wide range of colours This A5 Journal is available in several colours for different scenarios! 2 Bookmarks Bookmarks are more convenient and less damaging to the paper than folding books to register page numbers. Elastic Closure Elastic is made of high-quality materials, safe and durable, skin-friendly, and has strong elasticity.
